title: Return of the Hero-King, Inglis
overview: An ancient king is reincarnated countless years after his death so that he can truly master the blade.

title: Encounter With the Hyral Menas
overview: Inglis comes to learn more about the strange world around her, and how it differs from her own time.

title: Setting Out for the Capital
overview: Inglis leaves her home and sets out for the capital to begin the next stage of her life.

title: The Town Ruled by the Highlander
overview: Inglis makes a new friend after a complex battle involving the leader of the Bloodchain Brigade.

title: Royal Knights' Academy
overview: Inglis begins her new life at the Knights' Academy.

title: Labyrinth of Trials
overview: The party is selected to take a special test that will push them to their mental limits.

title: The Hyral Menas's Disease
overview: Ripple is very sick, and it looks like the Highland is responsible...

title: The Order to Protect Ripple
overview: The students of the academy set up teams to protect Ripple from the magicite beasts she's unwittingly summoning.

title: A New Artifact
overview: Rani gets a powerful new artifact with a unique ability.

title: The Plan to Attack a Highlander
overview: A new Highlander emissary comes, and the Bloodchain Brigade wants him dead.

title: Butt-Kicking Squire
overview: The plan to save Ripple proceeds as Inglis meets a powerful foe.

title: Clash! Hero-King vs. King of Rainbows
overview: A Prisma has materialized, and now it's up to everyone to join forces to defeat it before it destroys everything in its path.
